name: Amazon Fire Stick / Fire TV
intro: The Amazon Fire Stick is the most popular device for streaming. Follow these steps to set up LiveTVServices on your Fire TV device in under 5 minutes.
steps: Open Fire Stick home screen, go to search, and install the 'Downloader' app.
Enable Developer Options: Go to Settings > My Fire TV > About. Highlight your device name and click the select button on your remote 7 times until you see 'You are now a developer'.
Allow Unknown Apps: Go to Settings > My Fire TV > Developer Options > Install Unknown Apps. Toggle 'Downloader' to ON.
Launch 'Downloader' and enter the URL of a premium player (e.g., IPTV Smarters, XCIPTV, or TiviMate) to download and install the app.
Open the player, select 'Log in with Xtream Codes API', and enter the Username, Password, and Server URL provided in your LiveTVServices welcome email.

faqs.q: What is the best player for Fire Stick?
faqs.a: TiviMate is widely considered the most advanced player for Fire Stick. IPTV Smarters (Smarters Player Lite) is also an excellent, free alternative that is very easy to set up.

faqs.q: My Fire Stick is buffering, how can I fix it?
faqs.a: Ensure your Fire Stick has a strong Wi-Fi signal. If possible, use the 5GHz network band or an Ethernet adapter. Clearing the cache of your player app can also resolve lag.

name: Smart TV (Samsung / LG / Sony)
intro: Watch directly on your TV without external streaming sticks. We support all major Smart TVs running Tizen, webOS, Android TV, and Google TV.
steps: Open the App Store on your Smart TV (Samsung Smart Hub, LG Content Store, or Google Play Store).
Search for and install a compatible player app. We recommend 'IPTV Smarters Pro', 'Smart IPTV', 'IBO Player', or 'Net IP TV'.
Open the app. It will either show a MAC address or ask for Xtream Codes login credentials.
If it asks for credentials: Enter the Username, Password, and Server URL sent to you by email.
If it shows a MAC address: Visit the player's activation website on your phone/computer, input the MAC address, and upload the M3U Playlist URL we sent you.

faqs.q: Do I have to pay for the TV player app?
faqs.a: Some TV apps like Smart IPTV or IBO Player require a one-time activation fee (usually around €5) after a 7-day free trial. This fee goes to the app developer, not to LiveTVServices.

faqs.q: How do I load the electronic program guide (EPG)?
faqs.a: Our M3U links and Xtream Codes include automatic EPG URLs. The TV player app will parse the guide automatically upon loading the service.

name: Android Phone / Tablet / TV Box
intro: Set up on any Android smartphone, tablet, or dedicated TV Box (such as Nvidia Shield or Xiaomi Mi Box) for portable or home viewing.
steps: Open the Google Play Store on your Android device.
Search for 'Smarters Player Lite' or 'XCIPTV' and install the application.
Open the app and select 'Login with Xtream Codes API'.
Input your login details: Username, Password, and Server URL.
Click 'Add User' and wait a moment for the channel lists and VOD catalog to load.

faqs.q: Can I use the subscription on multiple Android devices?
faqs.a: You can install the subscription on as many devices as you like. However, you can only stream on one device at a time unless you purchase a multi-connection package.

name: Apple TV / iPhone / iPad
intro: Stream seamlessly on iOS, iPadOS, and tvOS devices. We support high-quality Apple players that sync your playlists automatically.
steps: Open the App Store on your Apple TV, iPhone, or iPad.
Search for 'Smarters Player Lite' or 'GSE Smart IPTV' or 'iPlayTV' and install it.
Select 'Xtream Codes API' or 'M3U Playlist' login format.
Enter the connection credentials provided by LiveTVServices.
Enjoy streaming with smooth touch and Apple remote navigation.

faqs.a: Yes! You can stream channels on your iPhone or iPad and cast them to your Apple TV or AirPlay-compatible smart television.

name: MAG Box / Infomir
intro: MAG Boxes are specialized hardware decoders designed for IPTV. We support MAG 250, 254, 322, 420, 520, and all newer models.
steps: Send us your MAG device's MAC Address (usually starts with 00:1A:79:...) during purchase or via support chat.
Turn on your MAG box, go to Settings > System Settings > Servers > Portals.
Set Portal 1 Name to 'LiveTV' and enter the Portal URL we sent you in Portal 1 URL.
Save settings and reboot the MAG box.
The box will load our interface directly. You can now browse channels using your remote.

faqs.q: Why is my portal not loading on MAG?
faqs.a: Double check that your MAC address is registered with us and that the Portal URL is entered exactly as provided, including capitals and symbols. A reboot is required to apply changes.

name: Web Browser (Windows / Mac)
intro: Watch directly on your computer without installing any special software. Perfect for viewing on the go.
steps: Open any modern web browser (Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Apple Safari, or Microsoft Edge).
Navigate to the web player portal link provided in your setup email.
Enter your subscription Username and Password.
Select the TV channel, movie, or series category from the sidebar and click play.

faqs.q: Does browser streaming require browser plugins?
faqs.a: No, our modern HTML5 web player works out of the box on all operating systems without any plugins or extensions.
